name: Bitwise Chainlink ETF
business: The Bitwise Chainlink ETF is an investment trust that issues shares to provide exposure to the value of Chainlink, less expenses. Its sole asset is Chainlink, and its shares are listed on NYSE Arca under the ticker CLNK.

exposures.sentence: The Trust's primary investment objective is to seek to provide exposure to the value of Chainlink held by the Trust, less the expenses of the Trust's operations, generally just the sponsor's management fee.

catalysts.event: Initial listing of shares on NYSE Arca
catalysts.sentence: The Shares of the Trust were listed on the Exchange on January 14, 2026.
